title: NotebookLM将推出文献综述矩阵功能
full_text:
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog on X: "Google is working on a new Artifact type for NotebookLM called "Lit review". In this mode, NotebookLM will be able to "Generate a Literature Review Matrix" based on your sources.
Considering upcoming additions of Google Play Books and Text Books as sources, Google is planning https://t.co/mSupVkzhnN" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
Google is working on a new Artifact type for NotebookLM called "Lit review". In this mode, NotebookLM will be able to "Generate a Literature Review Matrix" based on your sources.
Considering upcoming additions of Google Play Books and Text Books as sources, Google is planning to push new use cases for readers and writers.
Will it be able to map out all characters from "A Song of Ice and Fire"?
11:56 AM · Jun 20, 2026 32.9K Views

discovery_record.discovery_summary: Google 正在为 NotebookLM 开发一种名为 "Lit review" 的新 Artifact 类型。在此模式下，NotebookLM 将能够基于你的来源 "生成文献综述矩阵"。 考虑到即将新增 Google Play Books 和 Text Books 作为来源，Google 计划为读者和作者拓展新的用例。 它能否梳理出《冰与火之歌》中的所有角色？
